name: PowerSploit
summary: PowerSploit is a collection of Microsoft PowerShell modules for post-exploitation. Includes PowerView (AD recon), PowerUp (privesc audit), Invoke-Kerberoast, Invoke-CredentialInjection, and more.

trust.warning: Attribution/index entry only. Audit provenance, code, releases, and licence before use. Operates against the operator's own authorized scope only.
